Sandbox_FactionWar_CaptureTime_tooltip: Total time required to capture a zone from 0% to 100%.
Sandbox_FactionWar_AnnounceCapture_toolt: If enabled, the server announces when a faction captures a zone.
Sandbox_FactionWar_CapturePointsPerTick_:
Adjusts how fast progress is added when capturing.
Higher is faster.
Sandbox_FactionWar_DecaySpeed_tooltip:
Adjusts how fast progress drops when the zone is empty.
Higher means you lose progress faster.
Sandbox_FactionWar_SalaryItemType_toolti: The item players receive daily for owning zones.
Sandbox_FactionWar_SalaryAmount_tooltip: How many items players receive PER zone their faction owns.
Sandbox_FactionWar_PassiveXPAmount_toolt: How much XP players gain every few seconds while standing inside their faction's zone.
Sandbox_FactionWar_OfflineProtection_too: If enabled, zones cannot be captured if the defending faction has no online players.
Sandbox_FactionWar_OfflineProtectionExpi: How many hours the protection stays active after the last member logs off. Set to 0 for permanent protection while offline.
Sandbox_FactionWar_AbandonmentTimeout_to: If no members of a faction log in for this many hours, they automatically lose all their zones. Set to 0 to disable.
Sandbox_FactionWar_CustomSalaryItem_tool: Type one or more item IDs separated by semicolons (e.g. Base.Money;Base.Axe) to use as the daily reward. A random item from the list is chosen for each payout. Overrides the dropdown above.
Sandbox_FactionWar_CustomCrateItem_toolt: Type one or more item IDs separated by semicolons (e.g. Base.Axe;Base.Hammer) to refill into linked loot crates. Items will be chosen randomly from the list. Overrides the dropdown above.
Sandbox_FactionWar_CrateLootAmount_toolt: How many of the main reward item are placed inside the loot crate when it refills every 24 hours. Default is 15.
Sandbox_FactionWar_CrateBonusLoot_toolti: If enabled, a small set of bonus items (Bandages, Painkillers, Soda) are added to the crate alongside the main reward.
